title: Bump tactus to v0.46.1 in pyproject and score processor lambda

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting implementation: bump tactus to 0.46.1 in pyproject + score-processor-lambda requirements, regenerate poetry.lock, then run lambda container smoke tests.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Edits complete: pyproject and score-processor-lambda requirements now pin tactus 0.46.1; poetry.lock regenerated. Next running score-processor-lambda container smoke test via make test-smoke.

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
Validation update: make: Entering directory '/home/derek/projects/Plexus/score-processor-lambda'
Building Docker image...
cd .. && docker buildx build \
	--platform linux/amd64 \
	--load \
	-f score-processor-lambda/Dockerfile \
	-t score-processor-lambda:latest \
	.
✓ Image built: score-processor-lambda:latest
Running smoke test in container...
docker run --rm \
	-v /home/derek/projects/Plexus/tests/smoke_test.py:/var/task/smoke_test.py \
	--entrypoint python \
	score-processor-lambda:latest \
	smoke_test.py
make: Leaving directory '/home/derek/projects/Plexus/score-processor-lambda' built image but smoke step failed due path expansion ( resolving to repo root). Re-ran smoke test manually with explicit mount to ; container smoke suite passed (10 passed, 0 failed) and confirmed tactus 0.46.1 inside image.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Validation update: make -C score-processor-lambda test-smoke built image but smoke step failed due path expansion in Makefile ($(PWD)/tests/smoke_test.py resolving to repo root). Re-ran smoke test manually with explicit mount to score-processor-lambda/tests/smoke_test.py; container smoke suite passed (10 passed, 0 failed) and confirmed tactus 0.46.1 inside image.
